channel.itunes:author: FORDY RUNS
channel.itunes:subtitle: FORDY RUNS Podcast
channel.itunes:summary:
Welcome to the FORDY RUNS Podcast & Livestream – your go-to destination for all things running, inspiration, and personal growth! Join FORDY RUNS aka Chris Ford, a renowned running coach, youtuber and motivational influencer, as he blends his infectious energy, expert insights, and engaging conversation with fellow runners and thought leaders. Dive into unfiltered conversations that delve deep into the art of running, conquering mental barriers, discovering effective training techniques, and exploring the transformative power of this exhilarating sport.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Shoe Talk Show 👟 | Live Running Shoe Q&A
item.itunes:title: Shoe Talk Show 👟 | Live Running Shoe Q&A
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Welcome to the FORDY RUNS Shoe Talk Show 👟 — a weekly live video podcast dedicated entirely to running shoes.


Recorded LIVE every Monday at 8:00 PM, this show is where runners can ask questions and get honest, practical advice about choosing the right running shoes for their body, training, and goals.


Each episode covers topics such as:

Which running shoes are right for you

Daily trainers vs race shoes

Carbon plate shoes — who actually needs them

Cushioning, stability, fit & shoe rotation

Shoes for beginners, marathon runners, and injured runners


I’m a qualified running coach, so when shoe choices overlap with training, injury prevention, or performance, I also share coaching advice to help you run better and stay healthy.


🗓️ Live Show Details

📍 Live every Monday at 8:00 PM

🎥 Recorded live → released as a video podcast & audio podcast

💬 Ask your questions live in the chat


If you’re overwhelmed by shoe choice, confused by marketing hype, or want expert guidance without the jargon, the FORDY RUNS Shoe Talk Show is here to help.


👉 Subscribe / Follow FORDY RUNS to never miss an episode.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Tokyo Marathon Tips & Course Strategy | Marathon Talk
item.itunes:title: Tokyo Marathon Tips & Course Strategy | Marathon Talk
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Tokyo Marathon 2026 Tips & Course Strategy | Marathon Talk


Preparing for the Tokyo Marathon 2026? This Marathon Talk special is your complete guide to race-day success. We break down Tokyo Marathon 2026 tips, expert course strategy, pacing plans, training advice, weather considerations, and everything runners need to know before lining up in Tokyo.


Whether you’re a first-time Tokyo Marathon runner, chasing a personal best, or traveling internationally for a World Marathon Major, this episode covers essential Tokyo Marathon tips 2026 — from navigating the flat, fast course to managing crowds, aid stations, nutrition, hydration, and race-morning logistics.


🎙️ In this episode, we cover:

Tokyo Marathon 2026 course breakdown & elevation profile

Tokyo Marathon pacing strategy for beginners and experienced runners

Training tips for Tokyo Marathon 2026

Weather expectations and how to prepare

Shoe, kit, and fueling advice for Tokyo

Race-day tips: transport, start line, wave placement & finish area

Common Tokyo Marathon mistakes to avoid


If you’re searching for Tokyo Marathon 2026 tips, Tokyo Marathon course strategy, how to run the Tokyo Marathon, or Tokyo Marathon race advice, this episode is built to help you run smarter, faster, and stronger.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: How to Avoid Injuries During Marathon Training | Physio Tips That Work
item.itunes:title: How to Avoid Injuries During Marathon Training | Physio Tips That Work
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Training for a marathon but worried about injuries slowing you down?

In this episode, a qualified physiotherapist from Carter & George breaks down exactly how to avoid injuries during marathon training, using proven physio strategies that actually work in the real world.


Whether you’re a first-time marathon runner or an experienced athlete, injury prevention is critical for staying consistent, healthy, and race-ready. We cover the most common marathon training injuries, why they happen, and what runners can do to train smarter—not just harder.


🎙️ In this episode, you’ll learn:

How to avoid injuries during marathon training

The biggest mistakes runners make that lead to injury

How much running volume is too much

The role of strength training, recovery, and load management

Early warning signs of injury runners should never ignore

Physio-approved tips to stay healthy and run strong all the way to race day


This episode is packed with practical physio advice, evidence-based insights, and simple strategies you can apply immediately to your marathon training plan.


👨‍⚕️ Expert Guest: Physiotherapist from Carter & George

🔗 Learn more or book an appointment: https://www.carterandgeorge.co.uk


If you’re serious about marathon injury prevention, improving performance, and finishing your training block feeling strong, this episode is for you.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Running Through Grief: Mental Health, Loss & Purpose After COVID
item.itunes:title: Running Through Grief: Mental Health, Loss & Purpose After COVID
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
What happens when grief knocks the wind out of your life — and you’re forced to find a way to keep moving?

In this powerful and deeply human episode, we sit down with Michael, an accomplished runner and satellite leader for FORDY RUNS Running Club in Catford, to talk about how running quite literally saved his life.


After losing his dad to COVID during the pandemic, Michael found himself battling depression and emotional numbness. Motivation disappeared. Direction vanished. But one step — and then another — slowly changed everything.


Michael opens up about:

  • Losing his father during the pandemic and the emotional aftermath
  • How depression showed up in his daily life
  • Discovering running as a tool for survival, not performance
  • The mental clarity, discipline, and community that running gave him
  • Becoming a FORDY RUNS satellite leader and helping others find their stride
  • Why running is about more than medals — it’s about staying alive


This episode is for anyone navigating grief, mental health struggles, or searching for purpose. Whether you’re a runner, thinking about starting, or just need to hear that recovery is possible — Michael’s story will stay with you.


🎧 If running has ever helped you through a dark moment — or you hope it might — this conversation is for you.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: London Marathon Tips & Coaching: How Everyday Runners Train Smarter and Race Better
item.itunes:title: London Marathon Tips & Coaching: How Everyday Runners Train Smarter and Race Better
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Training for the London Marathon? This episode is packed with practical coaching advice to help everyday runners prepare with confidence, avoid common mistakes, and arrive on the start line ready to run their best race.


We break down how to structure your marathon training in the final weeks, including pacing strategies, long-run execution, fueling and hydration, tapering correctly, and managing nerves on race week. You’ll learn how to train smart—not just hard—so you can stay healthy, consistent, and strong all the way to the finish on The Mall.


Whether you’re chasing a personal best or aiming to simply enjoy the experience, this episode shares proven coaching insights used by real runners balancing training with everyday life. If you want clear, realistic London Marathon tips that actually work, this is a must-listen before race day.

Perfect for first-timers and experienced marathoners alike. Lace up and let’s get you ready.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Marathon Talk: A Show Dedicated to the 26.2-Mile Journey
item.itunes:title: Marathon Talk: A Show Dedicated to the 26.2-Mile Journey
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Join us for another episode of Marathon Talk as Chris Ford and Hayden Harbud go deep into the world of marathon running — from the biggest races on the planet to the ones that mean the most at a local level.


In this episode, we break down the Abbott World Marathon Majors, rank iconic events, and share honest, unfiltered experiences from the start line to the final mile. We talk training realities, race-day mistakes, mental battles, and what marathon running actually feels like for everyday runners — not elites.


You’ll hear:

  • Honest reviews of major and local marathons
  • Event rankings and what makes a marathon truly great
  • Training insights that actually work in the real world
  • Race-day lessons you only learn the hard way
  • The physical and mental reality of running 26.2 miles


Whether you’re chasing a Six Star finish, planning your very first marathon, or simply looking for motivation to lace up and commit to the journey, this episode delivers real stories, practical advice, and genuine marathon inspiration.


🏃‍♂️ No hype. No shortcuts. Just real talk about running marathons.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: How to Prevent Injuries During Marathon Training — Explained by a Coach
item.itunes:title: How to Prevent Injuries During Marathon Training — Explained by a Coach
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
How to Prevent Injuries During Marathon Training — Explained by a Coach


Training for a marathon is challenging, and marathon training injuries are one of the biggest reasons runners fail to reach the start line. In this episode, a running coach breaks down how to prevent injuries during marathon training, sharing proven marathon injury prevention tips for beginner and intermediate runners.


You’ll learn why runners get injured during first marathon training, how to avoid common running injuries like shin splints, knee pain, IT band syndrome, and Achilles issues, and what actually works for injury prevention for runners. This video covers safe marathon training, how to increase mileage without getting injured, and how to balance running, recovery, and strength training.


Whether you’re preparing for your first marathon, building mileage for a half marathon, or simply want to run pain-free, this episode explains marathon training injury prevention in simple, practical terms. We discuss runner recovery, strength training for runners, proper running volume, rest days, running shoes, and how to listen to your body to avoid overtraining.


If you want to train smarter, stay healthy, and make it to race day without injury, this episode on how to prevent injuries while marathon training is for you.


Topics covered:

Marathon training injury prevention

How to avoid injury when running

First marathon training tips

Common running injuries and prevention

Strength training for runners

Recovery and rest days

Increasing mileage safely

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Training Smarter, Not Harder: How Periodisation Builds Peak Running Fitness
item.itunes:title: Training Smarter, Not Harder: How Periodisation Builds Peak Running Fitness
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Why do so many runners train hard… yet never feel fully fit on race day?


In this episode, we break down periodisation — the structured way of organising your training into phases so you don’t have to do every workout, every week, all the time.


Whether you’re following a 16–20 week training plan or building fitness year-round, understanding training cycles can be the difference between steady progress and constant fatigue, injury, or burnout.


We cover:

What periodisation actually means (in plain English)

How training phases work and why each one matters

When to focus on endurance, speed, strength, and recovery

Why doing “everything at once” stalls progress

How structured variety helps prevent plateaus and injuries

How to time peak fitness for race day


This episode is ideal for runners training for 5Ks, half marathons, marathons, or anyone who wants to train with more purpose and less guesswork.


🏃‍♂️ Train with intention. Recover properly. Peak when it matters.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Looking ahead to 2026
item.itunes:title: Looking ahead to 2026
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
In this episode of the Long Run Show, we look ahead to 2026 with a full breakdown of our goals, what we want to improve, and the races we’re most excited for in the year ahead. We dive into training plans, personal growth, performance targets, and how we’re setting ourselves up for our best season yet.

Whether you’re a runner planning your own 2026 race calendar or just love hearing about the behind-the-scenes grind, this episode is packed with motivation, strategy, and plenty of forward-looking fun.


Topics we cover:

🏃‍♂️ Our 2026 running and fitness goals

📈 What we want to improve in training and lifestyle

🎯 Key races we’re targeting next year

🔧 Lessons learned from this season

🚀 How we’re preparing for breakthroughs in 2026


If you’re ready to map out your own journey for 2026, this episode is the perfect place to get inspired.

Don’t forget to like, subscribe, and share your 2026 goals in the comments!

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Long Run Show Podcast Rewind 2025: Miles, Moments & Milestones
item.itunes:title: Long Run Show Podcast Rewind 2025: Miles, Moments & Milestones
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Join us for a special year-end edition of The Long Run Show as we hit rewind on 2025 — a year filled with miles, moments, and major milestones both on and off the road.


In this reflective (and slightly nostalgic!) episode, we break down the races that defined our year, the training highs and lows, the lessons learned, and the personal moments that shaped who we are today. From breakthrough performances to unexpected detours, we’re sharing it all.


In this episode, we cover:

🏃‍♂️ Our biggest running highlights of 2025

💥 The breakthroughs, the setbacks, and what we learned

🧠 Mindset shifts, growth moments, and personal reflections

🎯 Goals we hit — and the ones we’re carrying into 2026

😂 Behind-the-scenes stories you haven’t heard yet

✨ What’s next for The Long Run Show


Whether you’ve been with us since day one or you’re tuning in for the first time, this episode is the perfect way to close out the year and step into the next with motivation and perspective.


Hit play, look back with us, and get inspired for the miles ahead.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: I’m a Mum, I Work, I Run: The Honest Reality of Running Clubs
item.itunes:title: I’m a Mum, I Work, I Run: The Honest Reality of Running Clubs
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
What is it really like to be part of a running club when you’re an everyday runner, a mum, juggling work, and navigating identity as a woman of colour?

In this honest and real interview, one of our runners from FORDY RUNS Running Club shares her lived experience of running club life — the highs, the challenges, and the sense of belonging that comes from finding your people through running.


FORDY RUNS Running Club is the largest running club in the UK, and this conversation gives you a genuine insight into what that actually feels like on the ground — not from elite athletes, but from real runners balancing family, work, culture, and community.

This episode is for:

  • Everyday runners
  • Mums who run
  • People balancing work and training
  • Runners of colour
  • Anyone curious about joining a running club


On the FORDY RUNS Running Club channel, we create content that reflects real running club experiences, honest conversations, and inclusive stories — so if you’re searching for what running clubs are actually like, you’re in the right place.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.itunes:title: End of Year Running Shoe Review LIVE! 2025 shoes wrapped!
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
It’s time to wrap up 2025’s best (and worst) running shoes — LIVE! In this end-of-year running shoe review, we break down the top road, trail, race, and daily trainer shoes of 2025, sharing honest opinions, surprises, and lessons learned from a full year of testing.


Whether you’re training for a marathon, 5K, ultra, or just looking for your next daily trainer, this live session covers it all. Ask questions in the chat, share your favourites, and let’s debate which shoes truly delivered this year 👟🔥


🏆 What We’ll Cover:

Best running shoes of 2025

Top daily trainers, race shoes, and trail shoes

Biggest hits & misses of the year

Most improved brands & standout tech

Shoes we loved… and shoes we didn’t 😬

What to expect from 2026 running shoes


📌 Perfect for:

Runners choosing shoes for 2025–2026

Fans of shoe reviews & gear breakdowns

Anyone curious about the latest running shoe tech


👇 Join the live chat and let us know:

Your favourite shoe of 2025

Which shoe disappointed you

What you’re excited to run in next year


👍 Like, 🔔 subscribe, and 📤 share with your running crew to help the channel grow!

item.title: Is a Running Club Worth It in 2026?
item.itunes:title: Is a Running Club Worth It in 2026?
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Thinking of joining a running club in 2026? 🏃‍♀️🏃‍♂️ In this episode, we dive deep into whether being part of a running club is truly worth it — from motivation and structure to community and long-term results. We’ll walk you through the real advantages and drawbacks, and help you decide if it’s the right move for your running journey this year.


What you’ll learn:

How a running club can boost your performance, consistency and enjoyment

The social and psychological benefits of running with a group

Common trade-offs: cost, time commitment, pace matching

How to pick the right club for your goals and personality

Real-world examples and what 2026’s landscape looks like for clubs


🎯 Join an inclusive club today

One great option is FORDY RUNS Running Club — the largest running club in the UK, with more than 50 local groups nationwide and a huge, supportive online community. You can join for free, find your nearest local run group, or choose a social membership option. All abilities are welcome, and there are no barriers to getting involved.


👍 If you enjoy the video

Hit like and subscribe for more running-club insights and training episodes


Share in the comments: Have you ever been part of a running club? What did you get out of it?


Turn on notifications so you don’t miss future episodes!


🔗 Useful Info

FORDY RUNS Running Club — free to join, beginner-friendly, and active across the UK - https://www.fordyruns.com/running-club

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Live Running Q&A with Coach | Training Advice & Shoe Reviews
item.itunes:title: Live Running Q&A with Coach | Training Advice & Shoe Reviews
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Welcome to the Live Running Q&A with Coach FORDY — your weekly chance to ask anything about running, training, racing, or running shoes! Whether you're training for your first 5K or chasing a marathon PB, this live session is designed to help you become a stronger, smarter, more confident runner.


🏃‍♂️ What We Cover Live:

• Training tips for 5K, 10K, half & full marathon

• How to structure weekly training & avoid common mistakes

• Pacing strategies for race day

• How to build speed, endurance & consistency

• Running shoe advice, gear talk & honest recommendations

• Motivation, mindset & staying on track

• Live chat questions answered in real time


💬 Ask Your Questions LIVE

Drop your questions in the chat — training structure, race plans, running shoes, gear choices, form cues, fueling strategies, and more. Coach FORDY will answer as many as possible throughout the stream.


👟 Who Is Coach FORDY?

A qualified athletics and running coach helping runners through practical training advice, realistic plans, and also giving no-nonsense shoe reviews.


📅 Join Weekly!

Tune in each week for interactive discussions, coaching insights, and a motivating community of runners at all levels.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

Whether you’re a beginner runner, marathon trainee, or a seasoned athlete chasing a PB, this live stream is all about helping you run stronger, faster, and injury-free.


🏃‍♂️ What we cover:

Running technique & form tips for all abilities

Half marathon and marathon training plans

How to improve running speed, endurance & recovery

Running shoe reviews, comparisons & gear advice

Motivation, mindset & consistency for runners

Strength training, nutrition & cross-training for runners


💬 Ask your questions LIVE! Coach FORDY will answer your running, training, and shoe-related questions directly in the chat — covering everything from 5K race prep to marathon pacing strategies.


👟 About Coach FORDY:

A passionate running coach and content creator, FORDY has helped thousands of runners improve their performance through smart training, realistic plans, and honest gear reviews.


📅 Join every week for interactive running discussions, expert coaching insights, and community motivation — all focused on helping you become a better runner.

item.title: Why Do People Get Upset With Their Finishing Times?
item.itunes:title: Why Do People Get Upset With Their Finishing Times?
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Why Do People Get Upset With Their Finishing Times?

In this episode, we unpack the surprising emotional weight behind race results and marathon finish times. From the pressure of personal goals to the comparison trap fuelled by apps and social media, we explore why runners sometimes cross the finish line feeling frustrated instead of proud.


We break down:

• The psychology behind time-based disappointment

• How expectations and identity shape race-day emotions

• The difference between healthy ambition and harmful self-criticism

• How to reframe a “bad” time into meaningful progress

• Stories and insights from everyday runners and endurance athletes


Whether you’re chasing a PR, running your first marathon, or trying to understand the runner in your life, this conversation offers clarity, compassion, and practical takeaways for the next starting line.


New episodes every week. Subscribe for more deep dives into running culture, mindset, and performance. 🏃‍♀️🎧

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Being on YouTube Isn’t What You Think
item.itunes:title: Being on YouTube Isn’t What You Think
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Being on YouTube Isn’t What You Think — In this episode, we sit down with Chris Ford, founder of FORDY RUNS and one of the UK’s most authentic running YouTubers. Chris opens up about what it’s really like to grow a YouTube channel from scratch, build a passionate running community, and have a big influence without millions of subscribers.


We dive deep into the truth about being a creator, including:

🏃‍♂️ How Chris reviews running shoes and creates content that stands out

🎥 The process behind his videos and how he stays consistent

💬 Handling negativity and online criticism

💡 Honest advice for anyone wanting to start a running YouTube channel

🧠 How content creation supports his autism and neurodivergent mind


Whether you’re a YouTuber, runner, or just curious about the creator life, this conversation is packed with insight, inspiration, and real talk about what it takes to stay motivated and authentic on YouTube.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: How to Build the Perfect Spring Training Plan (Step-by-Step Guide)
item.itunes:title: How to Build the Perfect Spring Training Plan (Step-by-Step Guide)
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Ready to crush your spring fitness goals? 🌱 In this episode, we break down exactly how to build the perfect spring training plan — step by step. Whether you’re training for a race, getting back into shape after winter, or leveling up your workouts, this guide will help you create a smart, effective, and sustainable routine.


You’ll learn how to:

Set realistic spring fitness goals that actually stick

Balance strength, endurance, and recovery for long-term progress

Choose the right training split for your schedule

Avoid overtraining and burnout as the weather warms up

Track your progress and make adjustments week to week


This episode is perfect for runners, athletes, and anyone serious about building a structured training plan for spring success. No gimmicks — just proven methods to help you feel stronger, faster, and more energized.


If you’re ready to hit the ground running this spring, start here! 🌸


💪 Subscribe for weekly training tips, motivation, and performance insights.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Don’t Be That Runner: Race Day Etiquette Explained
item.itunes:title: Don’t Be That Runner: Race Day Etiquette Explained
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Whether you’re lining up for your first 5K or your tenth marathon, knowing proper race day etiquette can make or break the experience — for you and everyone around you. In this episode, we break down the unwritten rules of running: from where to line up at the start, how to handle water stations, and what not to do in crowded races.


Learn how to pace politely, pass safely, and celebrate respectfully. Featuring real runner stories and expert tips, this episode will help you run smarter, smoother, and with good vibes all around.


👉 Perfect for: new runners, seasoned racers, and anyone training for a 5K, 10K, half marathon, or marathon.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: NYC Marathon 2025: Everything You MUST Know - Marathon Talk
item.itunes:title: NYC Marathon 2025: Everything You MUST Know - Marathon Talk
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Welcome to our deep dive into the 2025 New York City Marathon! In this episode, we break down everything you need to know about the NYC Marathon 2025 — from race day logistics and course updates to elite runner predictions, training tips, and the unforgettable atmosphere that makes this one of the world’s most iconic running events.


Whether you’re a first-time marathoner, a seasoned distance runner, or just love the energy of New York City on race weekend, this episode gives you the insider perspective you won’t find anywhere else.


👉 We cover:

  • NYC Marathon 2025 course map and route strategy
  • What to expect on race day
  • Understanding what it is like
  • Tips and insider tricks
  • How to enjoy the whole experience


🎧 Tune in for exclusive insights, runner stories, and expert analysis to help you get ready for November 2, 2025 — the day NYC transforms into the biggest running party on Earth.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Beyond the Finish Line: Staying Motivated After Hitting Your Running Goals
item.itunes:title: Beyond the Finish Line: Staying Motivated After Hitting Your Running Goals
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
You’ve trained hard, crossed the finish line, and crushed your running goal — but now what? In this episode, we dive into what comes after achievement. Whether you’ve just finished your first 5K, hit a marathon PR, or checked off a major milestone, that post-race “what’s next?” feeling is real.


We’ll explore how to stay motivated, find new purpose, and keep running with joy once the goal that’s driven you for months (or years) is behind you. Hear insights on:

Overcoming post-race blues and burnout

Setting new goals without losing balance

Rediscovering the “why” behind your running

Building long-term motivation that lasts beyond medals and times


Tune in for practical tips, mindset shifts, and stories from runners who’ve been there — so you can stay inspired beyond the finish line.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

Whether you’re cheering from the sidelines or listening from home, this episode captures the true spirit of 26.2 miles through the Windy City.

item.title: Want to Run the Marathon World Majors? Here’s How!
item.itunes:title: Want to Run the Marathon World Majors? Here’s How!
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Want to run one of the Abbott World Marathon Majors but don’t know how to get in? 🏃‍♂️ In this episode, we’re joined by a special guest from Sportstours International, a leading tour operator that helps runners secure places at the biggest races in the world.

We break down everything you need to know about:

✅ How to enter the Marathon World Majors (even if you don’t get in via the ballot)

✅ The role of official tour operators like Sportstours

✅ The rise of the SuperHalfs series and why they matter

✅ What the future of the Abbott World Marathon Majors might look like

Whether your dream is to run Boston, London, Tokyo, Berlin, Chicago, or New York, or you’re curious about the next wave of global races, this episode will give you insider tips and clear pathways to get there.

🎧 Perfect for marathon runners, endurance athletes, and anyone chasing their World Marathon Majors Six Star medal!

👉 Don’t forget to subscribe for more training tips, race insights, and running stories.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Running, Coaching & Creating: Inside This Messy Happy
item.itunes:title: Running, Coaching & Creating: Inside This Messy Happy
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
In this episode, we sit down with This Messy Happy – the running coaches, creators, and athletes behind one of YouTube’s most inspiring running channels. We dive into their journey as coaches, their experiences as runners, and what it’s like to share their story online. From training tips and the challenges of balancing life with running, to building a community through YouTube and coaching, this conversation is packed with insights, laughs, and plenty of inspiration for runners of all levels.

If you’re passionate about running, coaching, or the creative side of sharing the sport, you won’t want to miss this episode.

item.title: What to Expect at Your Autumn Race | Marathon, Half Marathon & 10K Tips
item.itunes:title: What to Expect at Your Autumn Race | Marathon, Half Marathon & 10K Tips
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Are you getting ready for your autumn race — whether it’s your very first or your 100th? 🍂 In this episode, we break down everything you need to know about fall running races, from marathon race-day tips to half marathon strategy and 10K advice.


We’ll cover:

What to expect on race day at your marathon, half marathon, or 10K

Autumn running tips — weather, pacing, hydration, and gear

The difference between running your first marathon vs. your 100th race

Mental strategies to handle nerves, “the wall,” and unexpected challenges

Race-day logistics: corrals, aid stations, finish line recovery, and more

How to make the most of the fall racing season and enjoy the experience


Whether you’re chasing a marathon PR, running your first half marathon, or simply looking for race-day preparation tips, this episode is packed with advice for every runner. 🏃‍♀️🏃‍♂️


Perfect for anyone training for:

Fall marathons (Chicago Marathon, Berlin Marathon, NYC Marathon, Marine Corps Marathon, etc.)

Half marathons in autumn weather

10K races during race season


If you’re wondering what to expect on race day, this is your go-to guide for autumn racing tips.


👉 Don’t forget to subscribe for more running podcasts and marathon training content!


#Marathon #HalfMarathon #10K #AutumnRunning #FallRace #RunningPodcast #MarathonTraining #RaceDayTips #FallRunning

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Tapering Made Simple + Race Debriefs from Sydney & Newcastle
item.itunes:title: Tapering Made Simple + Race Debriefs from Sydney & Newcastle
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Struggling with how to taper before a big race? In this episode, we break down tapering in simple, practical steps so you can hit the start line fresh and confident. We also share our race experiences and lessons learned from the Sydney Marathon and the Great North Run in Newcastle — covering training insights, course highlights, and what worked (and what didn’t).


Whether you’re preparing for your first half marathon, tackling a full marathon, or just curious about these iconic events, you’ll walk away with strategies to improve your taper and inspiration from two world-class races.


👉 Topics covered:

Why tapering is essential (and common mistakes to avoid)

How to adjust mileage, intensity, and rest days

Sydney Marathon race recap: heat, course, and atmosphere

Great North Run debrief: the crowds, the course, and pacing takeaways

Final tips to boost confidence before race day


Perfect for runners of all levels looking to train smarter, race better, and enjoy the process.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: LIVE from the Great North Run!
item.itunes:title: LIVE from the Great North Run!
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
🎙️ LIVE from the Great North Run! Recorded live at the Banyan Bar on the Saturday before race day, just after our huge Shakeout Run, this special podcast captures all the excitement building up to the world’s biggest half marathon. We bring you live conversations, runner stories, and the buzz of the running community coming together on the eve of the Great North Run. Whether you’re gearing up for the start line or soaking in the atmosphere from afar, this episode puts you right at the heart of the celebration.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Nutrition Tips for Runners | Expert Advice from a Sports Nutritionist
item.itunes:title: Nutrition Tips for Runners | Expert Advice from a Sports Nutritionist
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Nutrition Tips for Runners | Expert Advice from a Sports Nutritionist 🏃‍♂️🥗


In this episode, I sit down with a sports nutritionist to discuss the most important nutrition tips for runners. Whether you’re training for your first 5K, chasing a marathon PB, or just want to fuel your runs better, this conversation will help you understand exactly what to eat before, during, and after running.


We cover:

✅ Best foods for runners to improve performance

✅ How to fuel long runs & marathon training

✅ Hydration tips and electrolyte balance

✅ Common nutrition mistakes runners make

✅ Recovery nutrition and meal planning for athletes


If you’ve ever wondered how to get the most out of your running through nutrition, fueling, and hydration, this episode is packed with expert advice to guide you.

item.title: Do You Have to Run a Marathon to Be a Runner?
item.itunes:title: Do You Have to Run a Marathon to Be a Runner?
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Do you need to run a marathon to call yourself a runner? 🏃‍♂️ In this episode, we dive into one of the biggest questions in the running community: what actually makes someone a runner?


Whether you’re training for your first 5K, running for fun, or dreaming of a marathon, this episode will help you feel confident in your running journey. We’ll talk about:


Why you don’t need to run 26.2 miles to be considered a runner

The difference between recreational runners and marathoners

Running motivation for beginners

How to build confidence no matter your pace or distance

If you’ve ever asked yourself “Am I really a runner?” — this one’s for you.


👉 Don’t forget to like, subscribe, and drop a comment sharing what makes you feel like a runner!

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Reaching Your Marathon Potential in 10 Years?!
item.itunes:title: Reaching Your Marathon Potential in 10 Years?!
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Reaching Your Marathon Potential in 10 Years?!


In this episode, we dive into the science and strategy behind marathon training and explore why it can take up to 10 years to truly reach your marathon potential. Whether you’re chasing a first marathon finish, aiming for a personal best (PB), or dreaming of a Boston Qualifier, understanding the long-term journey is key.


We’ll cover:

Why long-term consistency beats short-term training plans

How to build endurance, strength, and speed over years of running

The role of marathon training cycles in unlocking your full potential

What elite coaches and studies say about the 10-year rule in running

Practical tips to stay motivated and injury-free while chasing your marathon goals


If you’ve ever wondered how long it takes to peak as a marathon runner, this episode will give you the insights, strategies, and mindset you need for the journey.


🙌 Join the FORDY RUNS Running Club – the UK’s biggest online running community. Connect with runners of all abilities, share your journey, and get support.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Race Season Ready: The Everyday Runner’s Guide
item.itunes:title: Race Season Ready: The Everyday Runner’s Guide
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Autumn race season is coming fast — are you ready to crush your next 5K, 10K, half marathon, or marathon? In this episode, we break down exactly how the everyday runner can prepare for race season without burnout or injury. You’ll learn essential race training tips, smart running workouts, and practical running gear advice to help you run faster, recover better, and feel confident on race day. Tune in and get race-season ready!

item.title: You Asked, We Answered: Running, Autism, & Our Favourite Races!
item.itunes:title: You Asked, We Answered: Running, Autism, & Our Favourite Races!
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
In this special Q&A episode, we’re answering YOUR questions! From our all-time favourite races to how running has changed since being diagnosed with autism, we dive into the topics that matter most to us—and to you.


We talk about the highs and lows, what keeps us motivated, how our relationship with running has evolved, and what it really means to be part of a community that gets it. Whether you're here for the training tips, the personal stories, or just a bit of real talk—you’re in the right place.


🎧 Topics we cover:

Favourite races (and why)

Running with an autism diagnosis

Our training routines & mindset shifts

Listener-submitted questions we loved

And a few unexpected tangents!


We loved connecting with you on this one—thank you to everyone who sent in questions. 💬

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Sydney Marathon 2025 | Berlin & Chicago Ranked | Marathon Talk
item.itunes:title: Sydney Marathon 2025 | Berlin & Chicago Ranked | Marathon Talk
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
In this exciting episode of Marathon Talk, FORDY RUNS and Hayden dive deep into all things World Marathon Majors – starting with the big news: the Sydney Marathon is officially a Major in 2025! 🇦🇺


We break down what this means for the running world and analyse how Sydney’s course elevation stacks up against the iconic – and hilly – New York City Marathon. Will Sydney offer a faster, more scenic challenge? We’ve got the details.


💬 Plus:

✅ 3 Things We Love and Don’t Love about both the Chicago and Berlin Marathons – from crowd support to course layout to logistics.

🌐 A heated debate on the current World Marathon Majors lineup – should there be more? Fewer? And which cities around the globe deserve a spot on the list?


Whether you're chasing six stars or dreaming of a race Down Under, this is an episode you won't want to miss.


📲 Available now on YouTube, Spotify, Apple Podcasts and everywhere you get your running content

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: How to Stay on Track with Your Running While on Holiday | Easy Training Adjustments That Work
item.itunes:title: How to Stay on Track with Your Running While on Holiday | Easy Training Adjustments That Work
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Planning a getaway but don’t want to lose your running momentum? In this episode, we dive into practical and flexible ways to keep your training on track while enjoying your holiday. Whether you're heading to the mountains, relaxing on the beach, or exploring a new city, we’ve got strategies to help you balance rest, adventure, and running.


You'll learn:

✅ How to adjust your training plan without guilt

✅ Time-efficient workouts that fit any schedule

✅ Creative ways to use your surroundings for running

✅ Cross-training ideas when running isn't an option

✅ How to maintain fitness with minimal effort


Plus, we share real-life examples and tips to keep your motivation high—even when your routine is out of whack.


🎧 Tune in before your next trip and make every run count—without missing out on the holiday fun!

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.itunes:title: How to CRUSH Your 10K Race – Pro Tips for Pacing, Strategy & Fast Finishes
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Ready to crush your next 10K race? Whether you're chasing a new PR or just want to finish strong, this video breaks down proven 10K race strategies that actually work.


In this episode, you'll learn:

✅ How to pace the perfect 10K

✅ Common mistakes runners make—and how to avoid them

✅ Proven tactics for negative splits and strong finishes

✅ Mental tricks to stay sharp in the final miles

✅ Race-day prep tips that set you up for success


Whether you’re a beginner or a seasoned runner, these tips will help you train smarter and race harder. Let’s make your next 10K your best yet!


📌 Drop your race date in the comments & let us know your 10K goal time!

👍 Like, Subscribe & turn on notifications for more race-day strategy videos.

item.title: Why You Should Never Miss The Long Run
item.itunes:title: Why You Should Never Miss The Long Run
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
The long run isn’t just about logging miles — it’s where the real training happens.


This is the session that sets the foundation for everything else. It's your chance to simulate race conditions, test your gear, experiment with hydration and fueling strategies, and dial in your pacing. In short, the long run is the perfect opportunity to prepare both your body and your mind for race day. Think of it as your weekly rehearsal on the battlefield — not just a workout, but a strategic test run.


In this video, we break down how we approach the long run to get the most out of every session. Whether you're training for your first marathon or looking to shave minutes off your PB, these tips will help you run smarter, not just longer.


➡️ We cover:


How to structure your long runs


What gear and kit we use and why


Nutrition and hydration strategies that actually work


Adjusting pacing to match your race goals


Mental tactics to build resilience and confidence


Grab your shoes, fill those bottles, and let’s dive into how to make your long runs count!

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: How Much Running Is Enough? Finding the Right Weekly Mileage for You
item.itunes:title: How Much Running Is Enough? Finding the Right Weekly Mileage for You
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Are you training for a half or full marathon and wondering how to build your weekly mileage without burning out or getting injured? In this episode, Coach FORDY shares 8 smart, practical tips to help average runners gradually increase distance — the safe way!


From the 10% rule to cutback weeks, easy run pacing, and cross-training strategies, these tips will help you stay consistent, avoid overtraining, and get to race day strong and confident.


✅ Perfect for beginner to intermediate runners

✅ Half marathon and marathon training tips

✅ Weekly mileage planning made simple


🎙️ What You'll Learn:


How much mileage to add each week


When to cut back mileage (and why it matters)


Why easy runs are your secret weapon


How to avoid injury while increasing distance


The best way to structure your weekly long run


📩 Got questions? Drop them in the comments or join us live on the next FORDY RUNS Q&A!


🎧 Also available on Spotify, Apple & all major podcast platforms — search FORDY RUNS Podcast

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Are CRAZY Running Goals Actually Helping You?
item.itunes:title: Are CRAZY Running Goals Actually Helping You?
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Are you setting yourself up for success or disappointment with crazy running goals? In this episode, we explore whether having ambitious running goals is actually helping you achieve your fitness aspirations or hindering your progress. From unrealistic expectations to unexpected benefits, we dive into the pros and cons of setting extreme running goals and what you can do to make your goals work for you. Whether you're a seasoned marathon runner or just starting out, this video will give you a fresh perspective on how to set running goals that will push you to new heights.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: MYTHS BUSTED by a Running EXPERT?
item.itunes:title: MYTHS BUSTED by a Running EXPERT?
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Get ready to have your mind blown as a running expert sets the record straight on common myths that have been holding you back from achieving your running goals! From debunking myths about footwear to exposing the truth about stretching, this video is packed with valuable insights and surprising revelations that will change the way you approach your runs. Whether you're a seasoned marathon runner or just starting out, this myth-busting session is a must-watch for anyone looking to improve their performance and stay injury-free. So, what are you waiting for? Let's get started and separate fact from fiction in the world of running!

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: MENTAL HEALTH AWARENESS WEEK - Community
item.itunes:title: MENTAL HEALTH AWARENESS WEEK - Community
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Mental health awareness is crucial in today's society, and it's time we give it the attention it deserves. In this video, we're shining a light on the importance of prioritizing our mental wellbeing and creating a culture of openness and understanding. From breaking down stigmas to fostering a supportive community, we're diving into the ways we can work together to promote mental health awareness and create a brighter future for all. Tune in to join the conversation and let's take the first step towards a mentally healthier world.

item.title: What Happens NEXT After a Big Training Block?
item.itunes:title: What Happens NEXT After a Big Training Block?
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Are you curious about what happens after a big training block? Whether you're a professional athlete or a fitness enthusiast, you know that a big training block can be both physically and mentally exhausting. But what happens next? Do you take a break, or do you keep pushing yourself to new heights? In this video, we'll explore the importance of recovery, active rest, and periodization in your training program. We'll also discuss how to avoid burnout and prevent overtraining, so you can continue to make progress and reach your fitness goals. So, if you're wondering what happens next after a big training block, then keep watching to find out!

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Key Mistakes to Avoid Before Your Race Day
item.itunes:title: Key Mistakes to Avoid Before Your Race Day
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Are you running a marathon on Sunday and feeling unprepared? Don't panic! In this episode, we'll cover the essential last-minute tips and tricks to get you ready for the big day. From what to eat, to how to stretch, to mental preparation techniques, we've got you covered. Get the lowdown on everything you need to know in the 24 hours leading up to your marathon. Whether you're a seasoned runner or a newbie, this video is packed with valuable information to help you feel confident and ready to crush your goal. So, take a deep breath, relax, and let's get started!

item.title: Tips For Running Marathons Close Together
item.itunes:title: Tips For Running Marathons Close Together
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
This episode we are changing things up! Join Fordy and Ben as they go on a run and give tips on how to run marathons close together! Maybe you have the Brighton Marathon and then the London Marathon, what do you do in the 3 weeks between? The boys draw on the experiences and discuss how they manage the physical demands of running 26.2 miles twice in a row, to the mental preparation required to push through the walls of exhaustion, we're diving into the world of ultra-running to find out if it's possible to conquer two marathons in a row. Whether you're an experienced marathon runner or just starting out, this video is for anyone who's ever wondered what it takes to be an ultra-marathon champion. So, buckle up and let's get ready to hit the pavement!

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Should you join a running club? Here are all the benefits
item.itunes:title: Should you join a running club? Here are all the benefits
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners

item.title: WINTERIZE Your Running with These Proven Training Secrets!
item.itunes:title: WINTERIZE Your Running with These Proven Training Secrets!
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Are you tired of your running progress coming to a halt during the winter months? Do you struggle to stay motivated and consistent with your training when the weather gets cold? In this video, we're sharing our top proven training secrets to help you winterize your running and stay on track all year round. From adjusting your pace and stride to incorporating strength training and cross-training, we've got you covered. Learn how to overcome common winter running obstacles and take your training to the next level. Whether you're a seasoned marathon runner or just starting out, these winter running tips will help you stay ahead of the game. So, what are you waiting for? Let's get started and crush your running goals this winter!

item.title: FORDY RUNS Weekly Livestream & Podcast: BITESIZE
item.itunes:title: FORDY RUNS Weekly Livestream & Podcast: BITESIZE
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Welcome to FORDY RUNS, your go-to bite-sized podcast for all things running shoes! In each episode, we dive deep into the latest trends, technologies, and tips to help you choose the perfect footwear for your running journey. Whether you’re a seasoned marathoner or a casual jogger, our expert insights will empower you with the knowledge to make informed decisions. This week I discuss the new running shoe from Asics the Sonicblast that will be releasing in 2025!


Join us as we explore various brands, styles, and innovations in the running shoe industry, providing you with practical advice and recommendations. Tune in for quick episodes that fit into your busy schedule, delivering valuable content in under 15 minutes.


Don’t miss out on our in-depth discussions about shoe types, cushioning technologies, and what to look for when purchasing your next pair. Subscribe now to FORDY RUNS and step into the world of running shoes with confidence!

item.title: Master Running 5k to Marathon: Training Secrets for Every Distance
item.itunes:title: Master Running 5k to Marathon: Training Secrets for Every Distance
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Are you ready to take your running to the next level? In this comprehensive episode, "Master Running 5k to Marathon: Training Secrets for Every Distance," we reveal proven strategies and expert tips to help you conquer any race distance, from your first 5k to the ultimate marathon challenge!


Join us as we cover essential training techniques, nutrition plans, and mental strategies tailored for runners of all levels. Learn how to properly build your mileage, incorporate speed work, and optimize your recovery for maximum performance. Whether you’re a beginner or an experienced runner, this video will provide you with the tools you need to succeed.


What you’ll discover in this video:

- Effective training schedules for 5k, 10k, half-marathon, and marathon distances

- The importance of cross-training and strength workouts

- How to prevent injuries and enhance your running form

- Tips on race day preparation and tapering for peak performance

- Motivational strategies to keep you focused and determined


Don't miss out on these invaluable insights that can transform your running journey! Hit the play button now and start mastering your running goals today!


Remember to subscribe for more expert running tips and training secrets!

Whether you're a seasoned runner or just starting out, these winter running tips will enable you to embrace the season and enjoy your outdoor workouts. Don’t let the cold weather hold you back from achieving your running aspirations!

item.itunes:title: Berlin Marathon 2024: Unboxing Our Epic Berlin Stories!
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Get ready for an exhilarating experience as we dive into the Berlin Marathon 2024! In this exciting video, we unbox our epic Berlin stories, sharing our journey, training tips, and unforgettable moments leading up to one of the world's most iconic marathons. Whether you're a runner, a marathon enthusiast, or simply curious about the event, this video is packed with inspiration and insights.


Join us as we discuss race strategies, the unique atmosphere of Berlin, and the incredible people we've met along the way. We’ll also highlight the breathtaking sights you can expect during the marathon and share personal anecdotes that make this event truly special.


Don’t miss out on our exclusive tips for preparing for a marathon, from gear recommendations to mental strategies that can elevate your running experience.


Hit that subscribe button and turn on notifications so you won't miss any updates as we gear up for race day! Share your own Berlin Marathon stories in the comments below and let’s connect with fellow runners! 🏃‍♂️🏃‍♀️

item.title: Completing the LONDON CLASSICS: The Insane Journey for the Triple Crown!
item.itunes:title: Completing the LONDON CLASSICS: The Insane Journey for the Triple Crown!
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
In this week's episode we discuss the exhilarating journey tackling the London Classics and strive for the prestigious Triple Crown! We'll take you through every step of the adventure, from the iconic streets of London to the breathtaking landmarks that make these races unforgettable. Experience the highs and lows of training, the thrill of race day, and the sheer determination required to complete these legendary events. 


Discover the secrets to our success, including tips on preparation, nutrition, and mental resilience that helped me overcome challenges along the way. Whether you're a seasoned runner, a fan of the sport, or just curious about the London Classics, this video has something for everyone. 


Don’t forget to like, subscribe, and hit the notification bell to follow my journey and get inspired to chase your own goals! Let's conquer the London Classics together! 


#LondonClassics #TripleCrown #RunningJourney #MarathonTraining #FitnessMotivation

item.title: parkrun Turns 20! Is It Still the BEST Way to Stay Active?
item.itunes:title: parkrun Turns 20! Is It Still the BEST Way to Stay Active?
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
In this episode, we take an honest look at whether parkrun is still worth participating in after 20 incredible years. With millions of runners and walkers around the world, parkrun has become a staple in the fitness community, but is it still relevant today? Join us as we explore the impact of parkrun on health, community, and personal growth. We'll discuss the pros and cons, share experiences from long-time participants, and consider what has changed over the years. Whether you're a seasoned parkrunner or thinking about joining for the first time, this review will help you decide if parkrun is right for you. Don’t forget to like, share, and subscribe for more in-depth reviews and fitness content! #parkrun #fitness #running

Are you a runner looking for answers to your most pressing questions? In this video, we tackle the **5 Common Questions Runners Ask ALL THE TIME**! Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned marathoner, understanding the ins and outs of running can enhance your experience and performance. 


Join us as we explore topics like training techniques, nutrition tips, injury prevention, gear recommendations, and much more! Get ready to gain insights that can elevate your running game in 2024. Don't forget to like, comment, and subscribe for more running-related content!

item.title: SIMPLE GUIDE TO TAPERING for Ultimate Marathon Success!
item.itunes:title: SIMPLE GUIDE TO TAPERING for Ultimate Marathon Success!
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Welcome to our video podcast on the ultimate marathon success! In this weeks episode, we will be discussing a simple guide to tapering, a crucial aspect of marathon training that can make all the difference on race day. Tapering is the process of reducing your training load leading up to a race in order to allow your body to rest and recover while maintaining fitness. Follow along as we provide tips and strategies for a successful tapering phase that will help you reach your marathon goals. Whether you're a seasoned runner or a beginner, this guide is designed to help you achieve peak performance on race day. Watch now and take your marathon training to the next level!

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.itunes:title: The Ultimate Motivational Speech for Marathon Runners - 20 Minutes at 20 Miles
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Are you a marathon runner in need of some motivation to push through your training and reach your goals? Look no further than this 20-minute inspirational speech specifically tailored for marathon runners.


In this powerful podcast, you will hear words of encouragement, tips for staying motivated, and stories of triumph from fellow runners who have faced and conquered similar challenges. Whether you're a seasoned marathoner or just starting out on your journey, this speech will reignite your passion for running and remind you of the strength and determination within you.


So grab your running shoes, hit play, and let this ultimate motivational speech propel you towards your marathon goals.


Don't let doubt or fatigue sideline your dreams - let this speech be the fuel that propels you across the finish line.

We'll kick off with a warm welcome and express our gratitude for the unwavering support we've received on this incredible podcasting journey. From there, get ready for a mind-blowing conversation as we take a deep dive into the captivating emails we've received from our dedicated audience.


Throughout this episode, we'll explore a wide range of topics, covering everything from recent episodes to personal anecdotes and intriguing suggestions. We'll share our insights, reactions, and expert opinions, ensuring that our valued listeners feel heard and appreciated.


Tune in to discover the magic behind our podcast as we answer thought-provoking questions, provide meaningful insights, and engage in lively discussions. You'll witness firsthand the genuine connection we have with our audience, and how their thoughts and opinions truly shape the direction of our show.


Join us for this unforgettable listener email extravaganza, where we celebrate the incredible bond we've formed with our community and shed light on the podcasting magic that happens behind the scenes. Don't miss out on this opportunity to hear your fellow listeners' perspectives, as well as the special surprises and announcements we have in store just for you!

item.title: Unlocking Your 10K Potential: Mastering the Art of Personal Bests
item.itunes:title: Unlocking Your 10K Potential: Mastering the Art of Personal Bests
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Welcome to our channel, where we are passionate about helping you unlock your running potential! In this video, titled "Unlocking Your 10K Potential: Mastering the Art of Personal Bests", we will take you through expert tips and strategies to help you achieve your best 10K run ever.


If you've ever wondered how to run a 10k personal best, you've come to the right place! Our experienced coaches will guide you step by step, providing valuable insights and practical techniques to improve your performance and reach new running milestones.


In this comprehensive tutorial, we will cover essential aspects such as proper warm-up routines, effective training plans, form correction techniques, and mental strategies to overcome challenges during your 10k races. By implementing our proven methods, you'll be well on your way to achieving a personal best time in your next 10k race.


Whether you're a seasoned runner aiming to beat your previous record or a beginner eager to conquer your first 10k, this video is designed to meet your needs. We believe that with the right mindset and training, anyone can achieve their personal best in the 10K distance.


Don't miss out on this opportunity to enhance your running performance and set new personal records. Join us now and unlock your 10k potential. Remember to subscribe to our channel for more valuable content on optimizing your running capabilities.


Ready to discover the secrets behind running a 10K personal best? Watch now and take your running journey to new heights!

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Running: Exploring the Rising Costs
item.itunes:title: Running: Exploring the Rising Costs
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Welcome to our livestream and podcast on the rising costs of running! In this insightful episode, we delve into the question: "Is running getting too expensive?" Whether you're a seasoned runner or just starting out, it's vital to understand the financial implications associated with this popular form of exercise.


Join us as we uncover key factors contributing to the escalating costs of running, such as pricey gear, race fees, and training expenses. We'll also provide practical tips on how to enjoy this fantastic sport without breaking the bank. Our expert guests will share their experiences and suggestions to help you manage your running expenses effectively.


Throughout this video, we'll address the significance of budgeting and offer budget-friendly alternatives for essential running equipment. Additionally, we'll discuss various strategies to find affordable races and ways to incorporate cost-effective training methods into your routine.


By examining the evolving landscape of running costs, we aim to empower you with the knowledge and resources needed to make informed decisions regarding your running journey. So, if you've been questioning whether running has become an expensive pursuit, you've come to the right place!


Remember to like this video, subscribe to our channel for more amazing content, and hit the notification bell to stay updated with our latest uploads. Feel free to share your thoughts and experiences in the comments below.


Thank you for joining us as we explore the ever-increasing costs associated with running. Stay tuned for eye-opening insights, valuable tips, and practical advice to make running more affordable and enjoyable for everyone.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: The Evolution of an Everyday Runner: Embracing the Journey
item.itunes:title: The Evolution of an Everyday Runner: Embracing the Journey
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Welcome to our channel! In this insightful video, we delve deep into the world of everyday runners and their incredible journey of evolution. Join us as we explore what it truly means to be an everyday runner and how they embrace the challenges and triumphs that come with the sport.


In "The Evolution of an Everyday Runner: Embracing the Journey," we unravel the personal stories of dedicated individuals who have discovered their passion for running, transforming it into an essential part of their lives. From humble beginnings to reaching personal milestones, this video takes you on a captivating journey filled with inspiration and motivation.


Throughout the video, we discuss the various aspects of an everyday runner's growth and development. We explore the physical, mental, and emotional transformation that occurs as they push their limits and overcome obstacles. Discover the powerful effects of running on their overall well-being, instilling discipline, resilience, and a sense of accomplishment.


With expert insights from seasoned runners and coaches, we share valuable tips and advice for beginners looking to embark on their own running journey. Learn about effective training techniques, proper nutrition, injury prevention, and setting achievable goals. Whether you're new to running or an experienced athlete, this video has something to offer for everyone.


Join us on this visually stunning adventure, as we showcase breathtaking footage of everyday runners conquering various terrains. Witness the beauty of nature, the determination on their faces, and the camaraderie that blossoms within the running community.


"The Evolution of an Everyday Runner: Embracing the Journey" is not just a story, but an invitation to be part of this incredible community. Running is not just a hobby or exercise; it's a lifestyle that brings people together, empowering them to achieve their full potential.


So, lace up your shoes, hit the pavement, and join us in this captivating exploration of what it means to be an everyday runner. Subscribe to our channel to stay tuned for more inspiring content, tips, and stories from the world of running.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: The Evolution of Running Clubs: Uniting Fitness Enthusiasts Worldwide
item.itunes:title: The Evolution of Running Clubs: Uniting Fitness Enthusiasts Worldwide
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Welcome to our channel! In this captivating livestream and podcast, we explore the remarkable journey and inspiring growth of running clubs around the world. Join us as we delve into the Evolution of Running Clubs, showcasing their incredible ability to unite fitness enthusiasts from every corner of the globe.


From humble beginnings to global phenomenons, running clubs have become more than just a place to train. They have evolved into tight-knit communities, fostering support, motivation, and friendship among like-minded individuals passionate about staying fit and healthy.


Discover the origins of running clubs and how they have evolved over the years, adapting to the changing demands and trends within the fitness industry. Witness the power of running clubs in driving positive change, promoting well-being, and creating a sense of belonging for its members.


We delve into the various types of running clubs, such as competitive clubs focused on marathon training, charity-based clubs lending a helping hand to their communities, and social clubs aimed at merging running with enjoyment and camaraderie.


Throughout this visually stunning journey, we'll share compelling stories from running club members worldwide who have experienced life-changing transformations, both physically and mentally, due to their involvement in these remarkable communities.


Join us as we celebrate the evolution, unity, and growth of running clubs, and witness firsthand the impact they have on individuals and society as a whole.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Running Regrets: Learn From Our Biggest Mistakes!
item.itunes:title: Running Regrets: Learn From Our Biggest Mistakes!
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
In this video, we share our personal journey as a runner and the biggest mistakes we've made along the way. By opening up about our running regrets, we hope to provide helpful insights and valuable lessons for both beginner and experienced runners. Watch as we discuss various topics such as improper training techniques, inadequate recovery, and poor nutrition choices that hindered my progress.


Join me as we recount my challenges and share our hard-earned wisdom, so you can avoid these pitfalls and achieve your own running goals. Whether you're aiming for a marathon or simply looking to improve your fitness, you'll find practical advice and beneficial tips throughout this video.


Learn from our experiences and take advantage of the opportunity to enhance your running performance. By avoiding these common mistakes, you can reach new levels of success and fulfillment as a runner. So, grab your running shoes and press play to discover the lessons we've learned firsthand.


Don't waste any more time making the same errors we did! Watch this video now and let us guide you toward a more efficient and rewarding running journey. Remember, it's never too late to improve your approach and achieve the results you desire.


For more informative videos on running, training techniques, and fitness tips, make sure to subscribe to my channel and hit the notification bell to stay updated with my latest content.

item.title: Can everyday runners conquer the marathon world majors? LIVE PERFORMANCE
item.itunes:title: Can everyday runners conquer the marathon world majors? LIVE PERFORMANCE
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
In this live performance at the National Running Show, we delve into a burning question: Can average runners conquer the world's most renowned marathons known as the "Marathon World Majors"? Join us on a thrilling expedition as we explore the potential of everyday runners in tackling these prestigious challenges. 


Prepare to be captivated by our exploration of the determination, training routines, and inspirational stories behind these ordinary individuals as they embark on extraordinary journeys towards achieving the unimaginable. 


Discover how, contrary to common belief, average runners possess an untapped potential that enables them to compete alongside world-class athletes in races such as the Boston Marathon, New York City Marathon, Berlin Marathon, London Marathon, Tokyo Marathon, and Chicago Marathon. 


Through exclusive interviews with seasoned marathoners and training experts, we uncover invaluable tips and strategies for average runners to enhance their performance and overcome the unique obstacles they may encounter during these iconic races. Witness firsthand the captivating personal achievements and transformative experiences that await those who dare to dream big and step out of their comfort zones. 


Embark on an exhilarating quest as we unveil the unspoken truths, lesser-known facts, and hidden secrets encompassing the dream of avergae runners breaking the barriers of the Marathon World Majors. Gain fascinating insights into the physical, mental, and emotional aspects that contribute to their remarkable accomplishments. 


Whether you're an average runner contemplating participation in these magnificent events or simply an enthusiast seeking to broaden your knowledge of marathon running, this video is your ultimate guide to understanding the true potential of average runners. 


Subscribe now to join us on this extraordinary journey of surpassing limits, defying expectations, and conquering the Marathons of the World!

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: The Truth About Running Influencers
item.itunes:title: The Truth About Running Influencers
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
In this eye-opening video, get ready to uncover the shocking truth behind the world of running influencers. "Exposed: Unveiling the Dark Secrets of Running Influencers" delves deep into the hidden realities that many influencers fail to reveal. 


Discover the untold stories of behind-the-scenes struggles, the relentless dedication required, and the strategies employed by running influencers to attain success. Through interviews with industry experts and heart-to-heart conversations with actual running influencers, we provide an unfiltered look at their experiences. 


From the pressures of maintaining an impeccable image and constantly pushing boundaries to the challenges of balancing personal life and online persona, we leave no stone unturned. Only by understanding the truth about running influencers can we appreciate the effort and determination that goes into achieving their goals. 


Prepare to have your preconceptions shattered as we examine the realities of this captivating realm. Countless hours spent capturing the perfect shot, overcoming self-doubt, and navigating the competitive landscape - it's all part of their journey.


With "The Truth About Running Influencers," we strive to shed light on an often glamorized industry and provide insight into the hard work that lies beneath the surface. Discover the stories of those who have dedicated themselves to this unique pursuit and gain a newfound appreciation for the world of running influencers.


Join us on this revealing adventure and brace yourself for an unmasking like no other. The secrets are about to be revealed – are you ready?

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Breaking Through the Wall: Power Mindset Hacks to Crush Running Plateaus
item.itunes:title: Breaking Through the Wall: Power Mindset Hacks to Crush Running Plateaus
item.itunes:subtitle: Award winning Running Podcast for Everyday Runners
item.description:
Are you tired of hitting a roadblock when it comes to your running progress? Don't worry, because we've got you covered! In this video, we will share some incredible mindset hacks that will help you overcome running plateaus once and for all.


With our expert tips and strategies, you'll learn how to break through the wall that's been holding you back. Say goodbye to frustrating plateaus and hello to new personal records! We believe that running is not just a physical activity; it's a mental game as well. So, we've compiled a list of power mindset hacks that will transform your running experience.


In "Breaking Through the Wall: Power Mindset Hacks to Crush Running Plateaus," we will delve deep into ways to optimize your mental focus, enhance your motivation, and boost your endurance. You'll discover how to train your brain as well as your body, leading to outstanding results.


Throughout the video, you'll get valuable insights on setting realistic goals, developing positive self-talk, and visualizing success. Our expert coaches will guide you through various techniques to stay motivated, focused, and determined during your runs. You'll also learn how to push through physical and mental fatigue, surpass your limitations, and conquer those daunting plateaus.


Whether you're a beginner trying to surpass your first-mile hurdle or an experienced runner seeking to set a new personal best, these mindset hacks are for you. Join us on this exciting journey as we equip you with the mental tools necessary to crush your running plateaus and exceed your expectations!


Don't let your mind hold you back from reaching your full running potential. Watch "Breaking Through the Wall: Power Mindset Hacks to Crush Running Plateaus" now and kickstart your journey towards becoming an unstoppable runner!

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.
